title: Computer Use Agents (Copilots)
summary: Show how a computer-use agent can respond to a prompt with a recorded demonstration video that starts only after Enter is pressed.
inputPlaceholder: Describe the software task the copilot should complete.
examplesCaption: Choose a prompt, then press Enter to load the software-action demo from the beginning.
outputCaption: This uses a placeholder YouTube embed link stored in the data section and can be swapped later with the final video.

examplePrompts.label: Grading support workflow
examplePrompts.prompt: Open the grading spreadsheet, identify missing rubric scores, and prepare a draft feedback summary for the instructor to review.
